brand_identity.name: Cove
brand_identity.primary_metaphor: The Gold Shield - Protection, Value, Solidity

general.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for card interiors. Gap-6 for grids.

onboarding.left_panel: Fixed width (40%), Dark Slate bg with Mineral Texture overlay, testimonials/branding.
onboarding.right_panel: Scrollable, Clean Marble bg, centered multi-step form.

compliance_matrix.table_style: Sticky header, zebra striping (slate-50), distinctive status badges.
compliance_matrix.gantt_style: Horizontal timeline, color-coded bars by severity.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-md rounded-xl h-10 px-6 font-medium transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-amber-600 text-white hover:bg-amber-700 shadow-md rounded-xl h-10 px-6 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 rounded-xl h-10 px-4 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

badges.critical: bg-red-100 text-red-800 border border-red-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.high: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border border-yellow-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.medium: bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 border border-orange-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.low: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-xl border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

backgrounds.dashboard_texture: Subtle noise/grain overlay on Slate backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react for professional/duotone icons.
INSTALL: yarn add framer-motion for smooth transitions.
SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (emerald, amber/copper, slate).
THEME: Default to Light Mode. Dark mode is optional/secondary.
FONTS: Import Playfair Display and Inter from Google Fonts in index.css.
CRITICAL: Do not use default Shadcn 'Card' without adding the custom border-t-4 styling for key metrics.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
NAVIGATION: Use a persistent Sidebar for the Admin Console, and a Top Navigation for the Corporate Dashboard.
AI SUMMARY: Use a sliding modal (Sheet) for the AI Legislative Summaries, not a centered popup, to allow reading while viewing the list.
universal_guidelines: Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover lifts, scale).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Padding is luxury.
Never use generic centered layouts. Use grids and asymmetry.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl on sticky headers.
Shadows: Use layered shadows (shadow-sm + shadow-md) for depth.
Data-Test-IDs: Mandatory for all buttons, inputs, and links.
